title: Transient tranfection of unicellular relative of animals,  Creolimax fragrantissima, using Lonza Nucleofector
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"6eo7k","text":"Keeps cells always on ice \u0026 all reagents must be ice-cold","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cl9i","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 300ul of culture + 9ml of Marine Broth in a 25cm2 flask
If there are more conditions, it is recommended to pull the cells together to get more visible pellet
P3 PrimaryCell 4D-Nucleofector Kit S (32 rxn) Kit Catalog# H3V4XP-5032 It is recommended not to keep the cells in P3 buffer for too long
Our plasmid contains sequence coding H2B-Venus under tubulin promoter It is recommended to have a highly concentrated plasmid
Carefully & without creating bubbles In total 20-22ul
creator: Aleksandra Kozyczkowska
